description.message: QWebBridge — browser extension for AI agents. AI can open pages, click, fill forms, extract info.

devClickHint.message: $N$ more clicks to enable advanced options

devTestFailed.message: Connection failed — check address, network, and that the daemon is running

devTrustWarningBody.message: It can click, type, read page contents, and operate tabs. Only continue if you fully trust this server.

devTrustWarningInsecure.message: ⚠ Connection is unencrypted (ws://) — anyone on the same network can monitor or tamper with traffic.

devTrustWarningTitle.message: This server will gain control of your browser

devUrlWrongProtocol.message: URL must start with ws:// or wss://
